li.label: body cultivator squeamish
li.description: I hate having this unnatural enhancement. a body cultivator does not need artificial part!

li.label: body cultivator disgusted
li.description: Two artificial enhancements are sullying my natural, pure body. It makes me sick to think of it.

li.label: body cultivator violated
li.description: Three artificial enhancements violate my body's pure flesh. I shudder when I think of it... and these objects shudder with me.

li.label: body cultivator horrified
li.description: I have four artificial enhancements; it's like I'm becoming a robot. What a horrifying sensation.

li.label: body cultivator nightmare
li.description: Five artificial enhancements... Is there anything left of me? Or am I just a robot that thinks it's human?

li.label: I have become what I hate
li.description: I asked for the exact opposite of this!
